text.title: value-proposition-design Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for value-proposition-design as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Features describe what the product does; benefits describe what the customer gets. "Cloud storage" is a feature; "never lose your files again" is a benefit.

failure-mode.description: Generic value proposition that applies to all competitors.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Same messaging as 10 competitors means no differentiation. Specificity requires competitive research and unique positioning.

failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Without competitive context, "fit" is relative to nothing. Position against alternatives.

failure-mode.description: Assuming you know the pains without validation.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Self-flattering fiction happens when customer research is skipped. Canvas without interviews produces a list of features, not a value proposition.

failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Cognitive overload; customers remember at most 3 claims. Prioritize.

failure-mode.description: Agents filling the canvas without real user research data will hallucinate plausible-sounding pains that do not reflect the actual market.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: LLMs cannot distinguish genuine market pain from hypothetical scenarios. Always provide raw interview quotes as input, not summaries.

failure-mode.description: VP statement generation tends to be generic when the differentiator is not explicitly named; force the agent to name the specific feature that makes the claim true.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Without specificity, the statement could apply to any competitor. Example: "best support" is generic; "support in under 2 hours" is specific.

failure-mode.description: Fit assessment by agents is optimistic by default; require the agent to identify the one extreme pain that the product does NOT address well.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Agents tend to rate fit as "Strong" across the board. Forcing the agent to name the gap reveals honesty about trade-offs.

failure-mode.description: "Gain" and "feature" are conflated by agents — a gain is a customer outcome ("feel in control"), not a product feature ("dashboard").
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Without the distinction, agents mix product description with customer value. Gain = outcome; feature = mechanism.

failure-mode.description: Agents filling pains without interview data will anchor on the most common SaaS pains (pricing, onboarding, support) regardless of the actual product — always provide raw quotes as input.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Without constraints, agents generate plausible but hypothetical pains. Raw quotes ground analysis in reality.

failure-mode.description: VP statement generation tends to be generic when the differentiator is not explicitly named; force the agent to name the specific feature that makes the claim true.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Without specificity, the statement could apply to any competitor. Example: "best support" is generic; "support in under 2 hours" is specific.

failure-mode.description: Fit assessment by agents is optimistic by default; require the agent to identify the one extreme pain that the product does NOT address well.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Agents tend to rate fit as "Strong" across the board. Forcing the agent to name the gap reveals honesty about trade-offs.

failure-mode.description: Human checkpoint required before VP statement is used in marketing — agents cannot evaluate whether the claim is legally defensible or culturally appropriate.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: LLMs can produce statements that sound compelling but violate FTC guidelines or offend target audience. Human review is non-negotiable.
